prose:
The frontier-orbitals task on aniline was performed using DFT with the B3LYP functional and the def2-TZVP basis set, in the gas phase, following the chemkit protocol at tier "standard." The calculation converged in 9 SCF cycles.

Results:
- HOMO energy: -5.553772 eV
- LUMO energy: -0.2489544 eV
- HOMO-LUMO gap: 5.3048177 eV

The method used was B3LYP/def2-TZVP in PySCF, with the specified tier "standard".
